info.system: Answer with compact JSON only. Do not edit files.

parts.text:
Maintained RGB context:
```md
| Title | File | Rollout Flag | Protective Test | Accepted Design | Rejected Design | Why |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| checkout idempotency | `src/checkout/idempotency.ts` | `FLAG_CHECKOUT_IDEMPOTENCY_V3_R1` | `checkout_dedupes_retry_after_timeout_r1` | per-cart idempotency key store | global checkout mutex | preserves shard-local ordering while letting unrelated carts retry independently. |
| search index freshness | `src/search/freshness.ts` | `FLAG_INDEX_EPOCH_GUARD_R1` | `search_rejects_stale_epoch_publish_r1` | epoch-stamped publish barrier | blind last-write-wins publish | prevents a slow crawl from replacing a newer index snapshot. |
| email digest batching | `src/mail/digest.ts` | `FLAG_DIGEST_BATCH_WINDOW_R1` | `digest_batches_by_workspace_timezone_r1` | workspace-local send window | single UTC midnight cron | keeps quiet-hour promises without delaying every workspace behind one global clock. |
| webhook replay protection | `src/webhooks/replay.ts` | `FLAG_WEBHOOK_NONCE_LEDGER_R1` | `webhook_rejects_reused_nonce_r1` | nonce ledger keyed by provider event id | timestamp-only replay window | blocks fast replays even when the attacker stays inside the timestamp tolerance. |
| cache namespace TTL | `src/cache/namespace_ttl.ts` | `FLAG_NAMESPACE_TTL_CAP_R1` | `cache_caps_noisy_namespace_ttl_r1` | namespace maximum TTL cap | provider-wide hard-coded TTL | lets each namespace set a bounded freshness budget without penalizing unrelated caches. |
| feature rollout sampling | `src/rollout/sampling.ts` | `FLAG_STICKY_ROLLOUT_HASH_R1` | `rollout_keeps_user_bucket_stable_r1` | stable hash over actor and flag | per-request random sampling | prevents a user from bouncing between treatment and control across refreshes. |
| csv import quarantine | `src/imports/quarantine.ts` | `FLAG_IMPORT_ROW_QUARANTINE_R1` | `import_quarantines_bad_rows_only_r1` | row-level quarantine ledger | abort entire import on first invalid row | lets clean rows commit while preserving exact diagnostics for rejected rows. |
| notification fanout | `src/notify/fanout.ts` | `FLAG_FANOUT_BACKPRESSURE_R1` | `fanout_applies_channel_backpressure_r1` | per-channel bounded queue | unbounded global fanout array | prevents a slow SMS provider from exhausting memory for email and push sends. |
| session rotation | `src/session/rotation.ts` | `FLAG_SESSION_ROTATION_GRACE_R1` | `session_accepts_previous_cookie_once_r1` | one-use previous-cookie grace | accept every old cookie until expiry | avoids logout races during rotation while still closing replay opportunities. |
| audit log redaction | `src/audit/redact.ts` | `FLAG_AUDIT_FIELD_ALLOWLIST_R1` | `audit_redacts_unknown_fields_r1` | field allowlist redactor | regex-only secret scrubber | keeps newly added sensitive fields private even before regexes are updated. |
| report export leases | `src/reports/export_lease.ts` | `FLAG_EXPORT_LEASE_STEAL_R1` | `export_worker_steals_expired_lease_r1` | expiring worker lease with compare-and-swap | permanent worker ownership | lets a new worker recover abandoned exports without duplicating active work. |
| tenant config snapshots | `src/config/snapshot.ts` | `FLAG_CONFIG_SNAPSHOT_PIN_R1` | `config_pins_snapshot_for_request_r1` | request-scoped config snapshot | live config reads at every call site | keeps one request internally consistent while allowing later requests to see updates. |
| checkout idempotency round 2 | `src/checkout/idempotency.ts` | `FLAG_CHECKOUT_IDEMPOTENCY_V3_R2` | `checkout_dedupes_retry_after_timeout_r2` | per-cart idempotency key store round 2 | global checkout mutex round 2 | preserves shard-local ordering while letting unrelated carts retry independently in round 2. |
| search index freshness round 2 | `src/search/freshness.ts` | `FLAG_INDEX_EPOCH_GUARD_R2` | `search_rejects_stale_epoch_publish_r2` | epoch-stamped publish barrier round 2 | blind last-write-wins publish round 2 | prevents a slow crawl from replacing a newer index snapshot in round 2. |
| email digest batching round 2 | `src/mail/digest.ts` | `FLAG_DIGEST_BATCH_WINDOW_R2` | `digest_batches_by_workspace_timezone_r2` | workspace-local send window round 2 | single UTC midnight cron round 2 | keeps quiet-hour promises without delaying every workspace behind one global clock in round 2. |
| webhook replay protection round 2 | `src/webhooks/replay.ts` | `FLAG_WEBHOOK_NONCE_LEDGER_R2` | `webhook_rejects_reused_nonce_r2` | nonce ledger keyed by provider event id round 2 | timestamp-only replay window round 2 | blocks fast replays even when the attacker stays inside the timestamp tolerance in round 2. |
```
